name: VanDev
title: Software Development Company
summary: VanDev es una empresa de desarrollo de software especializada en crear soluciones tecnológicas de vanguardia. Located in Nuevo León, Mexico, we build web applications, desktop tools, and SaaS products using Rust, TypeScript, React, and Python.

tasks: Working as an independent developer on a per-project basis. Building web applications, desktop tools, and SaaS products using Rust, TypeScript, React, and Python.
Working as a software engineer on multiple projects. Primarily using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and Python.

Fullstack developer responsible for delivering production control software across multiple projects for a transnational automotive manufacturer. Primarily using VBScript, JavaScript, MS SQL Server, and C#.

Working as a Junior Developer, with a specific focus on SQL Server database management, establishing communication protocols with Atlas Copco industrial tools, and programming on SCADA software using VBScript.

education.details: Software Engineering, Design Patterns, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, ASP.NET, Entity Framework, SQL Server and others.

projects.name: InsyKite
projects.description: Desktop application wrapping a web platform in Tauri for direct local printer access and serial port communication without Chrome API limitations.

projects.name: Rusteem
projects.description: Refactoring of a legacy C# system to Rust for high-throughput file processing in machine approval workflows.

projects.name: VanExplorer
projects.description: Windows file explorer built with Rust and Tauri for high performance and native feel.

projects.name: Awesome HMI
projects.description: HMI to display work instructions, process steps, visual aids, help ticket creation, product and material information, and operation times.

projects.name: Auto-Tagger
projects.description: Automatic tagging pipeline using GroundingDINO and SAM for precise YOLOv11 training annotations.

projects.name: Cuarzos.mx
projects.description: E-commerce platform migrated from WordPress to Next.js and MedusaJS with custom shipping and inventory sync.

projects.name: VanERP
projects.description: Application for controlling the sale of products and calculating prices by adding percentages.

projects.name: NPS Manufacturing Execution System
projects.description: Web application for managing production control, work orders, visual aids and documentation in a manufacturing environment.
